_meta.purpose: Persistent knowledge base for VAHDAM email content strategy and copywriting rules. Loaded once per session to reduce token usage.
_meta.source: Derived from production VAHDAM mailers and brand guidelines

brand_voice.tone: Premium, warm, aspirational but approachable. Never corporate or cold.
brand_voice.personality: Confident artisan. We know tea better than anyone because we source it directly.

examples: For the Mums Who Make Every Moment Beautiful
Give the Gift of Timeless Elegance this Mother's Day
She Deserves a Moment of Pure Luxury
mothers_day.avoid: Generic 'Happy Mother's Day' — be specific about the gift/experience

examples: Crisp, Cooling Summer Blends Are Back
VAHDAM Iced Teas Are Finally Back for Summer
Beat the Heat with Premium Cold Brews
Your Favourite Teas, Now Up to 55% Off
The Collection Sale You've Been Waiting For
Introducing Our Most Ambitious Collection Yet
New Arrivals: Premium Single-Estate Selections
A Story in Every Steep
Where Morning Mist Meets Hand-Picked Leaves
A Ritual Worth Slowing Down For
The Gift They'll Remember Long After the Last Cup
Luxury Tea Sets Crafted for Gifting

subcopy_rules.purpose: Expand on the headline with a specific benefit or emotional hook
subcopy_rules.style: Single sentence, conversational, bridges headline to CTA

patterns.product_benefit: She'll enjoy it every day and remember you.
patterns.sensory: Where morning mist meets hand-picked leaves, a ritual begins.

subject_line_rules.personalization: Use brand name (VAHDAM) at start for recognition

patterns.seasonal: VAHDAM [Seasonal items] are finally back for [season]

examples: VAHDAM – YOUR TURN TO MAKE HER SMILE NOW!
VAHDAM Iced Teas are finally back for summer
VAHDAM – Give the Gift of Timeless Elegance
VAHDAM – Premium Heritage Collection, 38% Off

announcement_bar.rule: Always include free shipping threshold. Always include offer code if one exists.

offer_bar_section.cta: Shop the Collection / Shop Now / Claim Your Offer

never: Show discount without specifying the percentage
Use 'HERITAGE' as default code — always use the actual code from the brief

primary_cta.rule: One clear primary action per section. Never more than 2 CTAs visible at once.

avoid: Multiple competing CTAs in same section

product_card_content.name: First part of product name (before comma), 11-13px bold serif

benefit_chip.purpose: One short benefit statement per product
examples: Antioxidant-rich
Naturally caffeine-free
Award-winning blend
Immunity boost
Cooling summer blend

mothers_day.emotional_angle: Gratitude, love, daily ritual that reminds her of you
mothers_day.hero_treatment: Gift set or premium box, elegantly styled
special_elements: 'Most Gifted on Mother's Day' social proof badge
Trust badges: Bestselling Gifts, Crafted for Rituals, Elegant Packaging

summer.hero_treatment: Iced tea lifestyle shot with condensation/ice
summer.offer_emphasis: Medium — focus on product variety over discount
special_elements: Ingredient strip with food photography icons (Turmeric, Ginger, Mint, Lemon)
UP TO 55% OFF badge if applicable

launch.hero_treatment: Hero product beauty shot, clean and minimal
launch.offer_emphasis: Low — focus on newness, not discount

testimonial_pool.quote: The finest tea I've ever tasted.
My morning ritual has completely changed.
Best iced tea I've ever made at home.
The quality is unmatched. Farm direct really makes a difference.

footer_content.legal_text: VAHDAM India Pvt. Ltd. · New Delhi, India
footer_content.unsubscribe_text: You received this because you subscribed at [store_domain]

before_approval: Headline is specific to campaign, not generic
Offer code matches the brief (not placeholder HERITAGE)
All product images are real Shopify CDN URLs (not AI-generated)
All links point to correct market store (US/UK/IN/EU/AU)
Preheader text is unique and compelling
No href='#' anywhere in the HTML
Social proof section has a relevant testimonial
Benefit strip items match campaign type
